lines.chords: Emaj7 -> E5 | Asus | C#7(no3) | B5 | Asus2
lines.lyrics: I got this feeling that's alright
Let's go out see the stars tonight
The sky is painted in gold for you

lines.chords: Emaj7 -> E5 | Asus | C#7(no3) | B5 | Asus2
lines.lyrics: Your pretty face in the moonlight
My heart lifts up like a bird in flight
You hold on to me like I'm already gone.

sections.name: Chorus
sections.annotation: Open hi-hats on quarters,Crash accents on bar downbeats, Four-on-the-floor kick - more driving and anthemic, Ride bell, Floor tom pulse on the 1

lines.lyrics: You already know
I won't let you go
Our hearts dance so slow
I won't let you go

lines.chords: Emaj7 -> E5 | Asus | C#7(no3) | B5 | Asus2
Emaj7 -> E5 | Asus | C#7(no3) | B5 | Asus2
lines.lyrics: When your lonely feeling lonely
Trust you're my one and only
I fell your love soft like the velvety sound
I fell your love doll but you already know
You already know
I won't let you go
Our hearts dance so slow
I won't let you go

sections.name: Bridge
sections.annotation: Half-time snare, Sparse kick, Rim clicks, Cymbal swells, Tom builds, Subtle shaker, China accent

lines.lyrics: No matter the walls we face we won't let down
Your voice like angel sweeping through the crowd
Echoes in chambers and halls they go grow so loud
Touch from a tender flame can you feel her now?
You already know
I won't let you go
Our hearts dance so slow
I won't let you go
